title: BlockGlitchFix
description: Prevent players from exploiting lag to bypass WorldGuard protections. Blocks placed in restricted regions teleport the player back to their last valid position.
body:
# 💫 BlockGlitchFix

**A lightweight Minecraft plugin that keeps players honest.** No more sneaky block placements to climb walls or cheat in parkour — if they try, they get sent back! ⚡

## ✨ Features

✅ **Automatic Block Protection** — Teleports players to their last safe spot if they try building where they’re not allowed.

✅ **Perfect for Parkour, PvP, and Survival Servers** — Stop cheaters, maintain fair gameplay.

✅ **Simple, Clean, and Lightweight — No bloat**, just solid anti-cheat mechanics.

✅ **Fully Compatible with WorldGuard** — Seamless integration with your protected regions.
## 
## 🎮 Why Use BlockGlitchFix?
## 
🌍 **Keep Your Server Fair** — Prevent block-glitch exploits and wall climbing.

⌨️ **Effortless Administration** — Less manual policing, more automated control.

⚔️ **Fair Play for Everyone** — Let skill, not hacks, decide the winner.

💨 **Smooth Gameplay Experience** — Stop cheaters without annoying your legit players.
